issues.detail: The skill does not cover all potential error scenarios such as network failures, index mapping errors, or rate limiting, limiting robustness.
The skill contains explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity, leading to verbosity.
While code snippets are provided, the instructions lack step-by-step actionable procedures for setting up the environment and executing the steps.
The skill references Node.js/Python examples and assumes specific runtime environments, limiting portability across all AI agents.
